title: Create: More Pipes n' Things
description: This Project adds more pipes to the create mod it's just a deco mod that i've decided to work on
body:
Create: More Pipes n' Things adds, well, more pipes and things!
ever wanted to use brass for pipes? now you can!
ever wanted iron tanks?, well now you can have them!
this mod adds compatability with two mods at the moment, but more will come in future versions!

<details>
<summary>Things Added As of 1.0.0 and Before</summary>

<details>
<summary>Pipes</summary>
  
- Andesite Alloy
- Iron
- Gold
- Zinc
- Brass
- Netherite

<details>
<summary>Compat</summary>
  
<details>
<summary>More Stuff</summary>

- Rose Gold
- Rosarite
</details>

<details>
<summary>Aether Addon: Treasure Reforging</summary>
  
- Valkyrum
- Pyral
